description.value:
Wondrous Item, Legendary (requires attunement by a spellcaster)

A 50-ft-diameter crystal globe in an ornate cradle. Bright light 300 ft, dim light 300 ft. Up to 8 creatures can attune. All attuned creatures must agree before any property activates.

Fly (action): Moves at 30 ft in any direction. All matter within 500 ft moves with it.

Recharge Item (action): One held magic item within 30 ft regains all charges/uses. Can't recharge same item again until it self-recharges.

Control Weather (action): Cast control weather, no components, no need to be outdoors, 50-mile radius. Must stay within 30 ft during casting time.

Touching the globe: DC 22 Con save or 180 (20d10+70) radiant damage, half on success. Undead have disadvantage. Non-artifact objects touching the globe are instantly disintegrated.
